sections.description: AI-powered CSS/JS asset scanner for WordPress.
sections.changelog: Version 1.7.64b (beta): The target-stack probe now runs one full-body scan when the page head shows a conclusive optimizer but no page-cache layer, so a co-present cache whose only signature is an end-of-body comment (e.g. Breeze on a warm file-cache HIT) is detected instead of missed. Additive — existing head detections (Perfmatters, WP Rocket, ...) are never downgraded. Informational only; scan rules and credits are unaffected.
